title: Move item to different group after a certain amount of days
excerpt: I am trying to move an item to a different group based after 180 days. Any ideas to help?

posts.author: erekson33 (Mitchell)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to move an item to a different group based after 180 days. Any ideas to help?

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mitchell,

Not sure if there are better options, but you could do it by adding a Date field then these 2 automations.

  1. When item is created set Date to Today Then Push Date by 180 days
  2. When Date arrives move item to Group

posts.author: erekson33 (Mitchell)
posts.cookedHtml: thank you, i am currently testing it to see if it will work
